message:
feat(index): complete pandas Index model with set ops, dedup, and slicing

Adds DuplicateKeep enum and 15 new Index methods: contains, get_indexer,
isin, unique, duplicated(keep), drop_duplicates, intersection, union_with,
difference, symmetric_difference, argsort, sort_values, take, slice, and
from_range. 23 new tests covering all operations.

Closes: bd-2gi.13

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
